brief: 目标：解决黄皮显白顾虑。 美甲肤色对比图，黄皮手部试色对比效果。 用户需求：夏日蓝色猫眼短甲，清透显白，参考图中同款风格。 视觉简报：展示夏日蓝色猫眼短甲在黄皮肤色上的清透显白效果，突出短方圆形状与主色调的和谐搭配。。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方圆。 甲长：短甲。 主色调：蓝色。 质感：猫眼。 光线：清透。 背景：参考图中同款风格。 风格：清透显白。 小红书图文风格，画面精美，高质感，无水印。

【参考图DNA摘要】
请参考历史案例的视觉 DNA，但不要机械复制原图。
历史案例主题：目标：抓点击 - 第一时间吸引用户眼球，激发点击欲望。 小红书美甲封面图，精致主视觉。画面主体是自然亚洲女性手部，展示最终美甲效果。 用户需求：夏日蓝色猫眼短甲，清透显白，参考图中同款风格。 视觉简报：展示一组夏日蓝色猫眼短甲的效果图，突出清透显白的质感，适合黄皮肤，展现短方圆形状的优雅与时尚。。 手型：自然亚洲女性手

历史 prompt 摘要：Create a poster image for poster aimed at broad professional audience. Treat this as a design-led visual solving this brief: 目标：抓点击 - 第一时间吸引用户眼球，激发点击欲望。 小红书美甲封面图，精致主视觉。画面主体是自然亚洲女性手部，展示最终美甲效果。 用户需求：夏日蓝色猫眼短甲，清透显白，参考图中同款风格。 视觉简报：展示一组夏日蓝色猫眼短甲的效果图，突出清透显白的质感，适合黄皮肤，展现短方圆形状的优雅与时尚。。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方. Communication goal: attract and persuade quickly in a campaign or recruitment context. Translate the brief into one strong hero concept rather than many equal-weight elements. Brand and context strategy: no explicit brand provided; commit to one coherent visual system instead of averaging styles. Visual system: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Hierarchy: one clear hero idea; one dominant hero visual or symbolic concept, never a collage of equal-weight objects; secondary elements must support the hero rather than compete with it; background should create rhythm, not narrative confusion. Composition: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast. Safe zone: reserve a clean, obvious text-safe zone in the upper third or one side for headline and CTA copy. Lighting: crisp premium lighting with controlled contrast and energetic highlights. Color strategy: restricted premium palette with disciplined neutrals and one energetic accent family. Detail density: hero-detail emphasis with a restrained background; hero-rich detail with restrained background complexity. Style direction: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Mood: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional. Aspect ratio: 3:4. Important constraints: make the result feel campaign-ready rather than generic AI art; prioritize focal hierarchy and typography-safe composition. Avoid: avoid generic AI clutter; avoid random floating UI fragments or HUD overlays; avoid generic gradient fog with no composition logic; avoid cheap neon cyberpunk treatment unless explicitly requested; avoid noisy micro-detail that weakens the hierarchy; poster text rendered directly into the image unless explicitly requested; random marketing icons and decorative interface fragments. Emphasize strong hierarchy, intentional whitespace, disciplined background complexity, and polished professional finish.
